positive: A stylized minimalist representation of a cosmic forest at twilight. The scene features luminous, ancient bioluminescent trees with branching root systems that glow in shades of cyan, indigo, and electric purple. Floating geometric celestial bodies, like crescent moons and nebula dust clouds, drift through the canopy. The ground is a smooth, matte black expanse contrasting with the vibrant, glowing flora. The overall composition is symmetrical and highly stylized, emphasizing strong, clean silhouettes and deep contrast, suitable for an apparel print. Highly detailed digital painting, concept art style, clean linework, maximalist detail, perfect symmetry, 8k resolution, deep depth of field, volumetric lighting, ethereal glow.
negative: text, signature, logo, watermark, poor quality, fuzzy, artifacts, blur, bad anatomy, deformed, lowres, noise, grain, extra limbs, extra fingers, cartoon, grayscale, messy, busy background
